subject: Review request: os_operations procedure packet UZG+ boundary risk
body: Lane_03 has wrapped NTS-updated os_operations procedure files into a pending amendment packet. Four files are v0.2 DRAFT candidate replacements; AMENDMENT_WORKFLOW_PROCEDURE.md remains skeleton because no local draft update was detected. No procedure is active until NTS approval.
requested_action: Review the amendment packet for UZG+ product boundary, rollback, crisis, propagation, and Lane-opening risks. Identify required revisions and whether Audit/Crisis should be deferred.
acceptance_criteria: Lane_02 reviews UZG+ product boundary risk.
Lane_02 reviews rollback, crisis, propagation, and Lane-opening risk.
Lane_02 identifies required revisions before NTS decision.
Lane_02 recommends whether Audit/Crisis should be deferred.
